summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>

<details class="msg tool">

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Evidence: The object tagged as 4 has been successfully picked up. The indoor plant is identified as the object tagged 50, located near coordinates \(0.52, 0.54, 0.38\). Hypothesis: The plant's position can be used as the target location to place the object near it. Verification: I moved close to the indoor plant and placed the object tagged as 4 near it at approximate coordinates \(0.5, 0.7, 0.5\). Decision and Next action: The object 4 has been placed near the indoor plant as requested, task completed.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>
